title: Heroes Reborn
description: I am developing my first mod Heroes Reborn. Currently in the process of porting Lucraft Heroes Expansion stuff into my mod as well.
body:
I am trying to make a faithful addition and recreation of Heroes Expansion in my own right under the name Heroes Reborn. I whole heartedly plan on expanding and refining what I already have and I am currently finishing up what I have developed so far. I do hope you enjoy what I have cared for.

Credit - https://gitlab.com/threetag/legacy/LucraftCore

Current How To (W.I.P)

Getting started!
First things first you're going to want to find an Aetherbloom. They can usually be found in meteor crashes (hard to miss) where you can find them at the heart of the crash. If you want up to one with a pair of shears and right click you will get Aetherium!. But I advise finding more. So what do you do with Aetherium? well first you need a Mortar and Pestle. If you put Aetherium in your off hand and hold the Mortar and Pestle in your main hand and right click the ground you get Aetheron!... or not, theres a 50% chance you dont get Aetheron. But lets say you did get Aetheron, going off that you know can progress to your next step.

You will need to craft and find room for the Centrifuge! You should also get your self a Empty Serum! which is crafted by surrounding one quarts in a crafting grid with glass panes. Once you have the Empty Serum you must find yourself a water source, then you need to right click water with the Empty Serum and BOOYA. H20 Serum, now we can move onto the next step!

Go over to your Centrifuge and place the H20 Serum in one input and then place the Aetheron in the other input. Fuel this with Coal on the left hand side of the GUI. After some time you should get Irradiated Serum. Now we are ready to move onto the SUPER stuff.

Next thing you want to do is place the Irradiated Serum in the Centrifuge with 1 Enchanted Golden Apple. You will need that to progress. Now if you do the Centrifuge will mix into the Super Serum! At this point the Centrifuge is no longer needed if you are just one person.

Moving on to the end game portion of Heroes Reborn. 
Once you have the Super Serum you will need ONLY one of the 6 different crafting items needed for your desired Serum. Now you once you have everything good! Now you need to craft a Genesis Engine, which requires a Genesis Core. Once the Genesis Engine is crafted (I recommend JEI) I recommend placing the Genesis Engine far away from your Base of Operations. Once you have placed your Genesis Engine go ahead and peak inside. There you will see two fuel inputs both requiring Ender Pearls. You will also see two inputs, this is where your Super Serum and your Serum Ingredient will go. The Genesis Engine draws a tremendous toll on our Earthly plain causing Electro Magnetic disturbances so I advice leaving the area until you hear the crackling when its finished. At which point you will see your desiginated Serum. Upon drinking this Serum you should feel POWER like no other but weak at the same time.

The Skill Tree!
Right away you will need to craft the Book Of Genesis, this is fairy cheap at this level. Enter your crafting grid with 2 Diamonds and one book and go ahead and grab yourself the BOG! Right click and bomb voyage you are now on your Super Journey.

Each power has their own requirement.
Ender Serum = Consume Ender Orbs
Icarus Serum = Soar through the sky!
WayBig Serum = Hold your form!
Mimic Serum = Kill Mobs!
Spectral Serum = Phase more!
Infernal Serum = Stay in Infernal Form! 

There are Uru Meteor that spawn with Mjölnir as well. These Meteors start spawning 1000 blocks away from spawn! I advise you to do /hrwc before you get your hopes up though.

 
Commands;
/heroesreborn givepoints
/heroesreborn removepoints 
/hrwc (Checks worthiness)

 - Aetherium in off hand with Mortar and Pestal in main hand on right click = 1 Aetheron
 - Empty Serum - Glass panes all around one quarts in the middle.
 - H20 Serum - Right click water with Empty Serum to fill
 - Irradated Serum - Centrifuge H20 Serum + Aetheron
 - Super Serum - Irradiated Serum + Enchanted Golden Apple in centrifuge = Super Serum
 - Ender Orb - Ender pearl in middle of crafting, 1 diamond in each corner and then between                Diamonds put quarts.
 - Reversion Serum - H20 Serum surrounded by quarts.
 - Mortar and Pestle - Plank of any kind and a stick diagonally top left or top right in a crafting grid.
 - Golden Feather - Feather Surrounded by Gold ingots
 - Diamond Feather - Feather Surrounded by Diamonds
 - Mirror - Glass Pane surrounded by Glass blocks
 - Centrifuge - Middle bottom in crafting grid is a culdron and then above that a smoker the rest of the grid surrounded by iron
 - Genesis Core - Corners are glass, outer middle ender perals, inner ender eye.
 - Genesis Engine - Genesis Core in middle top of crafting grid. middle obisdian, bottom middle obisdan, bottem left and bottem right obsidan.
                    Middle Right and Middle Left Diamonds, Top right and Top Left Obsidian.
----------------
I recommend JEI
----------------
Flight Matrix
- Ghast tear in middle 2 golden feathers top and bottom, left and right sides are 3 diamond feathers each side.

 Ender Heart
- 5% drop chance from ender man looting enchantment increases it 12% chance at max level looting.

 Giants Heart
- 9 Human hearts in a crafting grid

 Phantoms Delight
- Made by taking phantom membrane and surrounding it in diamond feathers.

 Faceless Moss
- Sculk Catalyst next to a mirror in any direction in the crafting grid

 Blaze Skull
- 3% drop chance from blaze

 Human Heart
- 35% Drop from villager and pillager

 *Genesis Engine reciepes*
      Fuel via Ender Pearl
Icarus Serum ---> Super Serum + Flight Matrix
Ender Serum ---> Super Serum + Ender Heart
Waybig Serum ---> Super Serum + Giants Heart
Spectral Serum ---> Super Serum + Phantoms Delight
Mimic Serum ---> Super Serum + Faceless Moss
Infernal Serum ---> Super Serum + Blaze Skull
